notes: Fortunes (slice 3) — a fuller catalog (~22 effects) across combat, trade, logistics, science, industry, escort, politics and piracy, now split into faint/strong/rare tiers. Mild effects still come from luck and exploring, but the strong and rare ones (Warlord's Edge, Golden Age, Renaissance, +1 action, +cargo…) are the prize of signals you hunt down — rarer signals grant stronger, longer effects. New effects touch cargo capacity, mining/production yield, convoy threat and your Wanted level (Lying Low cools it, Marked & Blockade raise it). Banes are easier to manage: clearing one gets cheaper as it nears its end, and answering a distress beacon can purge a bane outright. Signals now also show on the Galaxy map with an Investigate button. Balance-tuned with a simulation pass (~2.5:1 boons to banes).
